```markdown
# GraveOS

![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache%202.0-blue.svg)
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Linux%20x86__64-blue)
![Build](https://img.shields.io/badge/Build-Makefile-green)

**Run ARM Android apps natively on your x86 PC. No virtual machine. No emulation overhead.**

GraveOS is a compatibility layer that bridges Android's ARM ecosystem to x86_64 Linux systems through dynamic binary translation, kernel module patching, and runtime shims.

---

## Features

- **ARM to x86_64 JIT Translation** - Dynamically recompiles ARM binaries at runtime
- **Kernel Modules** - Binder and ashmem support for x86 kernels
- **Graphics Acceleration** - Vendor shims for Intel and AMD GPUs
- **Zygote Integration** - Fast Android app launching
- **Bootable ISO** - Generate a live bootable image

---

## Requirements

| Requirement | Minimum |
|-------------|---------|
| CPU | x86_64 with SSE4.2 |
| RAM | 4GB |
| Storage | 10GB free space |
| Linux Kernel | 6.1 or higher |
| OS | Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 12+, Fedora 38+ |

---

## Quick Start

### Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/assergames78-glitch/GraveOS.git
cd GraveOS
```

### Build everything

```bash
make all
```

### Build individual components

```bash
make kernel
make bridge
make runtime
make iso
```

### Run tests

```bash
make test
```

### Install on your system

```bash
sudo make install
```

---

## Project Structure

```
GraveOS/
├── kernel/          # Kernel modules (binder, ashmem for x86)
├── system/          # Core system (linker, libc shims, native bridge)
├── frameworks/      # Android frameworks (graphics, input, media)
├── runtime/         # Runtime (zygote, dalvik hooks)
├── prebuilts/       # Prebuilt kernel and initrd
├── scripts/         # Build and installation scripts
├── tests/           # Compatibility tests
└── vendor/          # Vendor-specific GPU shims
```

---

## Building from Source

### Install build dependencies

**Ubuntu/Debian:**
```bash
sudo apt update
sudo apt install build-essential git make gcc g++ nasm
```

**Fedora:**
```bash
sudo dnf install gcc gcc-c++ git make nasm
```

### Build

```bash
make clean
make all
```

---

## Usage

### Run an Android app

```bash
graveos run /path/to/app.apk
```

### Start the GraveOS runtime

```bash
sudo systemctl start graveos-runtime
```

### Generate bootable ISO

```bash
make iso
```

---

## Known Issues

| Issue | Status | Workaround |
|-------|--------|------------|
| OpenGL ES 3.0+ on Intel | In Progress | Use software rendering |
| Vulkan support | Planned | None |

---

This project is licensed under the Apache 2.0 License.

---

## Contributing

1. Fork the repository
2. Create a feature branch
3. Commit your changes
4. Push to the branch
5. Open a Pull Request

---

## Support

- Issues: https://github.com/assergames78-glitch/GraveOS/issues
- Discussions: https://github.com/assergames78-glitch/GraveOS/discussions
